items.issue: handleConstraintViolationException duplicates ~30 lines of handleValidationException verbatim (same type URI, title, detail, traceId property and errors map assembly), differing only in how the field name is derived
items.fix: Extract a private buildValidationProblemDetail(Map<String, List<String>> errors) helper and have both handlers call it

items.issue: Field name is derived by taking the substring after the last '.' in the property path, which collapses nested paths (e.g. 'save.dto.origin.countryCode' becomes 'countryCode') and can silently merge two distinct violations under one key
items.fix: Strip only the leading method-name segment (substring after the first '.') so nested paths stay distinguishable

items.issue: referenceNumber is accepted with no @Pattern/@Size constraint even though every other reference-number parameter on this controller carries @Pattern(ReferenceNumberGenerator.REFERENCE_NUMBER_PATTERN), so arbitrary free text of unbounded length reaches the Mongo query
items.fix: Decide the contract: either add @Pattern (and let the new ConstraintViolationException handler return 400) or document that free text deliberately yields an empty page and add @Size to cap length

items.issue: The debug log line interpolates the raw referenceNumber query param, echoing unvalidated user input into logs
items.fix: Drop referenceNumber from the log line or log it only once validated/trimmed by the service

items.issue: findByReferenceNumberAndStatusIn queries referenceNumber + status but the Notification document declares no @Indexed/@CompoundIndex, so the dashboard search is a collection scan on every keystroke-driven request
items.fix: Add an index on referenceNumber (it is already the natural key) via @Indexed on the Notification field or a compound index definition

items.issue: PageImpl is built with the caller's pageable (offset = (page-1)*25), so a reference search on page>1 self-corrects total to offset+1 — GET /notifications?referenceNumber=X&page=2 reports totalElements=26, totalPages=2 and repeats the same single match on every page
items.fix: Build the single-hit page against page 0 (e.g. PageRequest.of(0, listPageSize, sort)), or return Page.empty(pageable) when page > 1

items.issue: The two-arg findAll(page, sort) overload now has no production caller — NotificationController calls the three-arg form; only NotificationServiceTest still exercises it
items.fix: Delete the two-arg overload and update NotificationServiceTest to call findAll(page, sort, null)

items.issue: Unsanitised user-supplied referenceNumber is written straight into two debug log statements, so arbitrary free text (including newlines) reaches the log stream
items.fix: Log the trimmed reference only after it passes a format check, or cap/sanitise it before logging

items.issue: The test fixture mocks a violation on 'findAll.referenceNumber' with a REFERENCE_NUMBER_PATTERN message, but findAll's referenceNumber param carries no @Pattern — the scenario under test cannot occur in production and gives false confidence that search input is validated
items.fix: Either add @Pattern to the controller param (making the fixture real) or rewrite the fixture around a violation that actually fires, e.g. @Min(1) on page

items.issue: The new test asserts only status, title and the errors map — unlike the sibling MethodArgumentNotValid tests it never checks the null-traceId branch or the problem type URI/content type
items.fix: Add a handleConstraintViolationException_shouldHandleNullTraceId case mirroring the existing handleValidationException_shouldHandleNullTraceId

items.issue: No integration test covers reference search combined with page>1 or with a sort, which is exactly where the PageImpl total self-correction defect surfaces (totalElements becomes 26)
items.fix: Add findAll_shouldReturnSinglePage_whenReferenceNumberProvidedWithPageTwo asserting content is empty and totalElements is 1

items.issue: findAllNotificationsPage appends referenceNumber to the query string without URL-encoding, so any test value containing '&' or a space would silently build a different request
items.fix: Build the URI with UriComponentsBuilder or URLEncoder.encode so the helper is safe for arbitrary search terms

items.issue: New static import of org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.anyInt is never used anywhere in the file

findAll_shouldPassInvalidReferenceNumberToService is functionally identical to findAll_shouldPassReferenceNumberParam (same stub, same verify) — the only difference is the literal, so it asserts nothing about invalid input beyond pass-through
items.fix: Merge into a parameterised test, or make the intent explicit by asserting the response status is 200 and no ConstraintViolationException path is taken

items.issue: The three new findAll tests all use page 1, so none catches the PageImpl total self-correction that makes reference search return totalElements=26 on page 2
items.fix: Add findAll_shouldNotRepeatMatch_whenReferenceNumberProvidedWithPageTwo asserting totalElements is 1 (or content empty) for page 2

items.issue: findAll_shouldTrimReferenceNumber_beforeLookup stubs an empty Optional and only verifies the repository call, so it would still pass if the returned page were built incorrectly
items.fix: Stub a match and additionally assert the returned content resolves to the trimmed reference
